name: Pakistan Chicken Curry
recipeIngredient: 8 pieces chicken, with or without skin
1 pound fresh tomatoes (or 1-14 1/2 oz canned, diced)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a large pan over medium heat. Add chopped onions and sauté until translucent.
2. Stir in curry powder mix, bay leaf, and garlic. Cook for about 30 seconds to allow the spices to meld together.
3. Add fresh tomatoes or diced canned tomatoes, along with chicken pieces. Cook for an additional 3 to 5 minutes.
4. Pour in tomato sauce and water, then add the remaining chopped garlic. (If desired, you can sauté the garlic separately before adding it to reduce bitterness.)
5. Bring the mixture to a boil, then lower the heat and cover the pan. Simmer for approximately 40 minutes until the sauce thickens slightly.
6. Remove the lid and continue cooking uncovered for another 40 minutes or until the sauce has reduced further.
7. Season with cayenne pepper, salt, and pepper as desired. Serve over rice.
